display_text: Nether Shawl, Cost: 0: A neutral item providing +20% Magic Resistance and +6% Spell Amplification at the cost of -2 Armor. This unique defensive-offensive hybrid is ideal for spellcasters facing heavy magic damage, allowing them to amplify their own magic output while mitigating incoming spells. The armor penalty makes them more vulnerable to physical attacks. Stats: Magic Resistance: +20%, Spell Amp: +6%, Armor: -2.
